old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-u3ki","title":"EDHOC: Missing sensitive data wipe in export_oscore error paths","description":"SECURITY: edhoc_*_export_oscore functions don't wipe oscore output on error, potentially leaking partial key material.

Locations:
- edhoc_initiator_export_oscore (lines 733-771)
- edhoc_responder_export_oscore (lines 1148-1184)

If edhoc_kdf fails at line 746-748 (master_secret), the function returns early without wiping the partially-filled oscore struct.

If edhoc_kdf fails at line 752-754 (master_salt), master_secret has been written but oscore is not wiped.

Impact: On error, caller receives partially-initialized oscore struct with some derived key material. If caller doesn't check return value or doesn't wipe on error, key material may leak.

Fix: Wipe oscore struct on error before returning:
err:
    crypto_wipe(oscore, sizeof(*oscore));
    return ret;

File: lichen/subsys/lichen/edhoc/edhoc.c:733-771,1148-1184","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:46:08.461567Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:46:08.461601Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-u3ki","title":"EDHOC: Missing sensitive data wipe in export_oscore error paths","description":"SECURITY: edhoc_*_export_oscore functions don't wipe oscore output on error, potentially leaking partial key material.

Locations:
- edhoc_initiator_export_oscore (lines 733-771)
- edhoc_responder_export_oscore (lines 1148-1184)

If edhoc_kdf fails at line 746-748 (master_secret), the function returns early without wiping the partially-filled oscore struct.

If edhoc_kdf fails at line 752-754 (master_salt), master_secret has been written but oscore is not wiped.

Impact: On error, caller receives partially-initialized oscore struct with some derived key material. If caller doesn't check return value or doesn't wipe on error, key material may leak.

Fix: Wipe oscore struct on error before returning:
err:
    crypto_wipe(oscore, sizeof(*oscore));
    return ret;

File: lichen/subsys/lichen/edhoc/edhoc.c:733-771,1148-1184","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:46:08.461567Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T20:15:31.115546512Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T20:15:31.115546512Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T20:20:31.115546512Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T20:15:31.115546512Z"}

new_value: Added crypto_wipe(oscore, sizeof(*oscore)) on both kdf error paths in edhoc_initiator_export_oscore and edhoc_responder_export_oscore. Prevents partial key leak. Line numbers updated post-refactor. SECURITY fix. Commit 0c8bd7e5f
